documentation: See docs/predeploy/performance-budget-guide.md for rationale and escalation rules.

lcp.reason: LCP under 2.5s keeps the experience within 'good' and supports calm, imagery-led design.

inp.reason: INP under 200ms keeps interactions responsive (replaces FID in CWV).

cls.reason: CLS under 0.1 prevents visible layout shift; critical for motion and readability.

totalJsKb.reason: Total JS transfer cap to keep TTI and parse cost reasonable on mobile.

totalCssKb.reason: CSS budget supports design system and critical path without bloat.

fontRequests.reason: Limit font requests to avoid FOIT and extra round-trips.

thirdParty.reason: Cap third-party request count; allowlist documents accepted vendors (CMS, analytics, maps, forms).
